nl_query: Show all scripts where the scan was performed by a scanner device registered at a campus different from the campus where the exam was scheduled, indicating a potential logistics or data entry error.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.id, a.urn, esc.campus_id AS exam_campus, au.code AS scanner_campus
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   exam_schedule_cache esc ON esc.id = a.exam_id
JOIN   scan_history sh ON sh.script_id = a.id
JOIN   scanner_device sd ON sd.id = sh.device_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = sd.campus_id
WHERE  au.code IS DISTINCT FROM esc.campus_id
  AND  sh.scanned_at = (
         SELECT MAX(sh2.scanned_at)
         FROM   scan_history sh2
         WHERE  sh2.script_id = a.id
       )
ORDER  BY a.id;
error: Validation failed (semantic): LEFT JOIN on alias 'sd' is nullified by 'WHERE sd.campus_id = ...' which eliminates NULL rows. Move the filter into the ON clause: LEFT JOIN ... ON ... AND sd.campus_id = ..., or change to INNER JOIN if zero-match rows should be excluded.
